explanation: The property states that it must always be the case that either a healthcare professional is not operating the system, OR the alarm system log is not being erased. This precisely captures the intent that the forbidden combination of an operator erasing the log never occurs.
decision3_substring: shall not permit the healthcare professional operator to erase the contents of the alarm system log
